heading: Furniture for new buildings
label: 3104 Furniture for new buildings
text: Furniture for all new public buildings shall be acquired in accordance with plans and specifications approved by the Administrator of General Services.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)310440:283.1 [sic] (7th complete par. on p. 327), .May 27, 1908, ch. 20035 Stat. 327The words “Administrator of General Services” are substituted for “Supervising Architect of the Treasury” [subsequently changed to “Secretary of the Treasury” because of section 1 of Executive Order No. 6166 (eff. ) and to “Federal Works Administrator” because of section 301 of Reorganization Plan No. I of 1939 (eff. , )] because of section 103(a) of the Federal Property and Administrative Services Act of 1949 (ch. 288, ), which is restated as section 303(c) [303(b)] of the revised title.June 10, 1933July 1, 193953 Stat. 142663 Stat. 380
